name: Mach-O Binary Analyzer
description: Static triage of Mach-O binaries (macOS/iOS executables, dylibs, bundles, kexts) with macholib: arch/fat slices, file type, PIE, linked dylibs, RPATH, code-signature presence, and encryption (LC_ENCRYPTION_INFO). Emits BINARY.* atoms. Reads structure only — never runs the binary.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install Python 3.8+. macholib is vendored (pure-python), so no network/install at analysis time.

safety.notes: Static structural parse (macholib). Never loads, maps, or executes the binary.

payload.note: Vendored via `uv pip install --target runtime/site` (pure-python, portable). Completes the PE/ELF/Mach-O triage trio; emits BINARY.* atoms that map onto an MCD reading.
